# Netfo — Modern ERP for Automotive Businesses

> Netfo is a cloud-based Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) platform designed specifically for automotive dealerships and distributors worldwide.

## What is Netfo?

Netfo is a multi-tenant SaaS ERP platform that helps automotive businesses manage their entire operations from a single dashboard. It provides specialized modules for CRM, vehicle inventory, finance, HR, procurement, and logistics — all built specifically for the automotive industry.

## Core Modules

### CRM & Sales Pipeline
- Lead management with Automatic Distribution System (ADSL)
- Lead assignment strategies: round-robin, load-balancing, performance-based, geographic
- Full sales lifecycle: Lead → Quotation → Sale Order → Invoice → Delivery
- Follow-up scheduling and task management
- Sales analytics and performance dashboards

### Vehicle Inventory Management
- Complete vehicle catalog (brand, model, variant, specs, images)
- Stock movements and multi-location inventory tracking
- Vehicle inspections and condition reporting
- Pricing history with multi-currency support
- Reservations and viewing scheduling

### Finance & Accounting
- Double-entry bookkeeping with 170+ predefined account types
- Journal entries, general ledger, and trial balance
- Bank reconciliation and multi-bank support
- Customer payments, receipts, and contra transactions
- Multi-currency with exchange rate management
- Tax settings and financial year management

### Human Resources
- Employee profiles with contracts, positions, and departments
- Attendance tracking with configurable policies
- Payroll processing with salary components
- Leave management with balance tracking
- Employee loans with installment tracking
- Offboarding: resignations, terminations, warnings

### Procurement & Purchasing
- Purchase orders with approval workflows
- Supplier management and contracts
- Goods Receipt Notes (GRN) with quality inspections
- Request for Quotation (RFQ) process
- Three-way matching (PO, GRN, Invoice)

### Logistics & Fleet Management
- Shipment tracking with milestones
- Fleet vehicle management with driver assignment
- Route planning and delivery scheduling
- Shipping documents: BOL, commercial invoices, packing lists
- Carrier management and freight cost tracking

## Platform Features

- **Multi-Tenant Architecture**: Each company gets isolated data, custom branding, and independent settings
- **AI Integration**: Built-in AI chat and analytics powered by Claude, Google AI, and OpenAI
- **Dynamic PDF Templates**: Customizable invoices, quotations, and receipts with company branding
- **Advanced Permissions**: Role-based access with ALL, OWN, and BRANCH scope types
- **Multi-Branch Support**: Centralized or decentralized operations across locations
- **Workflow Engine**: Configurable approvals, status transitions, and business rules
- **Real-Time Updates**: WebSocket-powered live data synchronization
- **API Access**: RESTful API with Swagger documentation

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Radix UI
- Backend: NestJS, PostgreSQL, Prisma ORM
- Infrastructure: AWS (S3, cloud hosting), Redis caching
- Security: JWT, 2FA (TOTP), WebAuthn, encryption at rest and in transit

## Pricing

Custom pricing based on dealership size and needs. Contact us for a personalized quote.

Plans available: Starter, Professional, Business, Enterprise.

## Target Audience

- Automotive dealerships (new and used vehicles)
- Vehicle distributors and importers
- Multi-brand dealership groups
- Fleet management companies
- Automotive franchise operations
